textByHash.b756c92b887d02f088eea5cdeaf896033008526f: My brother was chosen as a sacrifice to Zulrah, but now the priests say you're going to sacrifice yourself first. You ruined everything!
textByHash.75828c0aaf55aea4e3271758d9c56bb53e8d5848: You don't get it, do you? He'd been looking forward to this for ages, and you ruined it. Now we won't even get the extra ration of sacred swamp eels.
textByHash.15987b3ecd0f63f4824ea7a28acd8600b10da2d3: I hope Zulrah chews you slowly when you sacrifice yourself.
textByHash.b476090c129dc1030479839c151e00bb18417ab2: Have you heard? My brother has been chosen as a sacrifice to the mighty Zulrah!
textByHash.31b2145b1aee92dce818f88596166972cf7ff217: I'm jealous! I want to see Zulrah face-to-face too. Maybe next year they'll let me go.
textByHash.9b9fe8baf593974f9b527a8f0e22aefff5efecf5: Also, when the sacrifice is made, our mother and I will get an extra large ration of the sacred swamp eels that Zul-Onan catches. I can't wait!
